name: Local Project Review Act (under SB 5290) - Annual Reporting Data

columns.name: Was this permit part of a consolidated review?
columns.description: Was this permit part of a consolidated review?

columns.name: Date Notice of Complete Application Issued
columns.description: Date Notice of Complete Application Issued

columns.name: Were there days excluded from or added to review?  (Pauses and additions)
columns.description: Were there days excluded from or added to review?  (Pauses and additions)

columns.name: Total excluded or added days  (Pauses and additions)
columns.description: Total excluded or added days  (Pauses and additions)

columns.name: Subdivision Review Cycle (for subdivisions that have gone through multiple review cycles, each cycle should be on its own row)
columns.description: Subdivision Review Cycle (for subdivisions that have gone through multiple review cycles, each cycle should be on its own row)

columns.name: Was there an agreed upon decision date?
columns.description: Was there an agreed upon decision date?

description: Annual permit performance report data as required by the Local Project Review Act, RCW 36.70B.080.  Data includes permits where a final decision was issued from 1/1/2025 through 12/31/2025.  *Please note: The complete column titles display in the downloaded file formats, since Open Data is a self-service platform and to cut down on questions from the public.

name: Use of Force
description: City of Bellevue Use of Force curated data from 2015 to present. This dataset is updated daily via automated means.

name: Bellevue Permits (Pending, Ready to Issue, Issued, Open)
description: Snapshot of Bellevue Development Services permitting data starting in 1998 to present day. This dataset is live. It is refreshed daily ~6AM Pacific Time. The spatial position of displayed permits is calculated from the permits system of record and may not match the location displayed in public mapping systems.This dataset has been filtered to display only permits with the permit status of "Pending", "Ready to Issue", "Issued", and "Open".For questions abou

name: Neighborhood Areas
description: Neighborhood Areas are used as planning areas for the City of Bellevue and are based on community. These Neighborhood Areas are part of Bellevue's Comprehensive Plan. They replace the Subareas for planning purposes.

name: Future Land Use
description: Displays the future land use designations within Bellevue, illustrating the city’s planned zoning and land use policies as outlined in its comprehensive plan. This layer guides growth and development by indicating areas designated for residential, commercial, industrial, mixed-use, and other land use types, ensuring alignment with the city’s long-term goals for sustainable development and community needs.

name: Street Lights (Small Wireless Facilities)
description: This dataset contains street light poles filtered by locations that are candidates for small wireless facilities.

name: Workforce Diversity
description: City of Bellevue Police Department workforce diversity data. This dataset is manually updated annually.

name: City of Bellevue Open Data
description: Open data is the first step to an informed, transparent, and engaged community. Explore our data and tools, provide feedback on what you would like to see next, and find out about opportunities to get involved.

name: Parcels
description: This layer represents the tax parcels in King County. This layer also includes place-holder polygons which do not represent tax parcels but are included to identify platted and unplatted land descriptions. The layer includes stacked polygon geometry for undivided interest and vertical parcels. King County parcel numbers may include leading zeros in PIN, Major or Minor. The data is created for Assessment purposes and is not guaranteed to represent accurate measurements or to reflect salability or

name: Private Storm System
description: This dataset contains private storm sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as discharge points, clean outs, access points, inlets, network structures, open drains, structures, gravity mains, later lines, pressure mains, and detention pips. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's stormwater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency respon

name: Utilities Storm System

The dataset includes various components such as access points, inlets, discharge points, fittings, valves, weirs, clean outs, detention vaults and ponds, pipes, open drains, casings, repairs, and culverts. This comprehensive dataset is crucial for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's stormwater management system, as well as for flood control, infrastructure development, and emergency respons

name: Mud Snail Infestation
description: Dataset detailing the geographic locations and extents of mud snail infestations within the region.

name: Incidents
description: City of Bellevue Incidents curated data from 2017 to present. This dataset is updated daily at 5:30AM PST via automated means.

name: Bellevue Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) Permits Data
description: Bellevue Development Services accessory dwelling unit permitting data.  This dataset is updated on a continual basis.

name: Arrests
description: City of Bellevue Arrests curated data from late 2014 to present. This dataset is updated daily via automated means.

name: Contour (50 ft)
description: This dataset provides locations and elevations of topographical contours at 50-foot intervals for the entire Bellevue area, offering detailed elevation and terrain - presenting a broader understanding of the region's elevation changes and landforms.

name: MyBellevue 311
description: This dataset contains data from the MyBellevue system that shows citizen request made over the web and mobile applications.Data Sources:PublicStuff:  https://www.publicstuff.com/developersData Collection Method:PublicStuff:  MyBellevue web and mobile applications.  Data found here will every 90 minutes.All data is to be considered as is without warranty of accuracy.

name: Salaries and Benefits by Job Title
description: Costs to the City for salary and benefits listed by job title. Costs to the City for salary and benefits listed by job title. Data contains historical information from year 2014 to Present

name: Annual Awarded Contracts
description: Listing of annual contracts by vendor.

name: Bellevue Population
description: Estimates of total population in Bellevue, Washington on April 1st each year since incorporation in 1953.

name: Capital Investment Program Plan Expenditures to Date
description: City of Bellevue Capital Investment Program (CIP) plan expenditures to date.

name: City of Bellevue Capital Investment Plan
description: The Capital Budget is applied towards one-time infrastructure and improvement projects. Data is current as of January 1st, 2021.

name: City of Bellevue Capital Investment Plan Details
description: Amended FY2019-FY2025 Biennial CIP Plan project descriptions and location where applicable.

name: City of Bellevue Budget Revenue
description:
Adopted FY2021-FY2022 Operating Budget Revenue. The projected revenues 
for the city. This includes income from taxes, fees, and other charges 
for services.

name: City of Bellevue Budget Expenses
description: Adopted FY2021-FY2022 Operating Budget Expenses by Outcome.

name: Operating Expenditures – Year to Date
description: City of Bellevue operating expenditures year to date.

name: Revenues – Year to Date
description: Revenues year to date for the City of Bellevue.

name: YTD Vendor Payments
description: City of Bellevue year to date vendor payments.

name: Bellevue Connect Hot Spots
description: This data set contains free public Wi-Fi access points located in and around the City provided by the City of Bellevue.  The data contained herein is generated from City owned resources and/or from publicly available data sources.  A connection to any Wi-Fi access point is subject to the terms of service to the owner and/or provider.Data Sources:City of Bellevue IT Dept (NSS) Bellevue ConnectData Collection Method:Bellevue Connect - Scraping application run on an as needed basis.  Updates requir

name: Business Licenses (All)
description: Listing by date of registered businesses. This listing updates daily via automated processes from on-premise data sources.Point features and Lat/Long fields are calculated from the physical address via geocoding processes.

name: Attendance Areas (Middle School)
description: This dataset outlines the middle school attendance boundaries within Bellevue, which helps guide the enrollment process and maintains a balanced distribution of students across different schools in the area.

name: Attendance Areas (High School)
description: This dataset outlines the high school attendance boundaries within Bellevue, which helps guide the enrollment process and maintains a balanced distribution of students across different schools in the area.

name: School District (Bellevue)
description: This dataset displays the boundary of the Bellevue School District (school district #405), defining the district's jurisdiction and service area.

name: School District (Regional)
description: This dataset outlines the boundaries of various school districts in the region, including Bellevue, Issaquah, Lake Washington, and Renton, illustrating their respective coverage areas.

name: School Sites
description: This dataset contains the location and names of schools within the Bellevue area, along with the district they belong to, providing a comprehensive view of educational institutions in the region.

name: Community Facilities
description: This dataset provides the locations and names of a wide range of city, county, state, federal, and private facilities within the Bellevue area. This information is vital for emergency planning, infrastructure management, and service provision analysis across different sectors in the region.

name: City Limits
description: This dataset contains the detailed boundaries and associated names of cities located in the northwestern region of King County, surrounding Bellevue. This dataset is essential for understanding the regional context of Bellevue and its neighboring cities for urban planning, infrastructure development, and other analysis purposes.

name: Annexations
description: This dataset contains the boundaries and names of areas that have been annexed to the City of Bellevue, providing information on the expansion of the city's jurisdiction over time.

name: Attendance Areas (Elementary School)
description: This dataset outlines the elementary school attendance boundaries within Bellevue, which helps guide the enrollment process and maintains a balanced distribution of students across different schools in the area.

name: Zip Codes
description: This dataset delineates the boundaries of zip codes in the Bellevue region, assisting with geographic organization and location identification within the area.

name: Contour (10 ft)
description: This dataset provides locations and elevations of topographical contours at 10-foot intervals for the entire Bellevue area, offering detailed elevation and terrain - presenting a broader understanding of the region's elevation changes and landforms.

name: Coal Zones
description: This dataset contains the boundaries of abandoned coal mines located in the Bellevue area, helping to identify areas of historical mining activity.

name: Floodplain Boundaries
description: This dataset includes the boundaries of the FEMA Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA) 100-year floodplain for identified streams within the Bellevue city limits. The data is useful for analyzing the impacts of floodplains on properties, structures, permitting, streams, and potential street/structure flooding.

name: City Trees
description: This dataset contains information on the locations, species, and sizes of trees within the Bellevue area, contributing to the understanding of the urban forest and helping with urban planning and management.

name: Utility Grid
description: Locations and designations for the cells of the utilities grid directory for the Bellevue service area.

name: Other Parks
description: This dataset contains the boundaries and names of additional parks in the Bellevue area that may not fall under the primary park sites category, providing further insights into recreational resources and opportunities for residents and visitors.

name: Park Sites
description: This dataset includes the boundaries and names of Bellevue's park sites, offering information about the locations and extents of recreational areas within the city.

name: Lakes
description: This dataset provides the boundaries and names of lakes in the Bellevue area, contributing to the understanding of local water bodies and their impact on the surrounding environment.

name: Streetscapes
description: This dataset presents the boundaries of features such as medians, parking strips, cover types (i.e. planting beds, tree wells, or hard surfaces).

name: Streams
description: This dataset includes the locations and names of major streams in the Bellevue area, contributing to the understanding of local hydrology, water resources, and potential flood risks.

name: Soils
description: Hydrologic soil groups classify soils based on their runoff-producing characteristics, while descriptions provide information on soil composition, texture, and other properties. This dataset is vital for understanding soil suitability for various land uses, assessing potential environmental impacts, guiding agricultural practices, and informing stormwater management and erosion control efforts.

name: Steep Slopes
description: This dataset depict slopes greater than 40% with areas greater than 1000 square feet, which is essential for understanding potential landslide risks, informing development regulations, and assessing environmental impacts. It was developed from a DEM that was compiled by the consultant Geoterra using the 2016 LiDAR.

name: Zoning
description: This dataset represents the boundaries of Bellevue's various zoning areas. Zoning regulations determine the types of land uses, building density, and development standards permitted within each area, playing a crucial role in shaping the city's growth, land use patterns, and overall urban planning efforts.

name: Urban Growth Boundary
description: This dataset represents the urban growth boundary for the Bellevue area, as defined by the Growth Management Act (GMA). The boundary helps to control urban sprawl, protect rural lands, and guide sustainable development by determining where future growth and infrastructure investments should be focused within the city and its surrounding areas.

name: Single Family Transition Areas
description: This dataset presents the locations of Bellevue's single family transition areas. These zones are designed to create a gradual transition between residential single family zones and more intensive land uses, by imposing development restrictions that help minimize potential land use conflicts.

name: Real Property
description: This dataset contains boundaries of city-owned properties in Bellevue, along with information about the responsible maintenance and ownership entities. The dataset is useful for managing public land, understanding city assets, and facilitating the coordination of maintenance efforts among various city departments and agencies.

name: Multi-Family Transition Areas
description: This dataset presents the locations of Bellevue's multi-family transition areas. These zones are designed to create a gradual transition between residential multi-family zones and more intensive land uses, such as industrial or commercial areas, by imposing development restrictions that help minimize potential land use conflicts.

name: Citations
description: City of Bellevue Citations curated data from late 2014 to present. This dataset is updated daily via automated means.

name: Police Sectors
description: City of Bellevue Police Department sectors. This dataset is updated daily via automated means.

name: Police Stations
description: This dataset includes the locations and contact information of each police station, allowing for effective law enforcement coordination, resource allocation, and public safety planning within the city.

name: Police Districts
description: This dataset consists of the police districts within Bellevue. These districts are designated areas managed by specific police stations, responsible for providing law enforcement and public safety services. The dataset is crucial for coordinating policing efforts, resource allocation, and public safety planning among various law enforcement agencies in the city.

name: Fire Stations
description: This dataset includes the locations and contact information of each fire station, providing essential information for emergency response coordination, resource allocation, and public safety planning within the community.

name: Fire Districts and Subdistricts
description: Boundaries and identifying numbers for fire station districts and subdistricts of the Bellevue Fire Department. These districts and subdistricts are designated areas managed by specific fire stations, responsible for providing fire protection, prevention, and emergency services. The dataset is vital for coordinating emergency response, resource allocation, and planning among various fire departments and public safety agencies.

name: Evacuation Routes
description: This dataset consists of the designated evacuation routes in Bellevue. These routes are strategically planned and marked to guide residents and visitors safely out of the city during emergencies, natural disasters, or other situations requiring a large-scale evacuation. The dataset is essential for emergency management, public safety planning, and community preparedness initiatives.

name: Emergency Response Priority Routes
description: This dataset depicts the designated emergency response priority routes in Bellevue. These routes are identified as critical transportation corridors for emergency vehicles, such as police, fire, and medical services, ensuring a rapid and efficient response during emergencies, natural disasters, or other high-priority situations.

name: Garbage Collection Districts
description: This data is based on the Service Schedule Map from the Republic Services website. The garbage districts were then digitized from the georeferenced image.

name: Water Pressure Zones
description: This dataset contains the boundaries of water pressure zones within the Bellevue water service area. These zones are primarily determined by elevation and represent areas with distinct pressure characteristics for water distribution. The dataset is essential for managing and maintaining the city's water supply system, ensuring efficient water delivery, and informing infrastructure planning and development projects.

name: Sewer Basins
description: This dataset contains the spatial data for sewer basins in Bellevue. Sewer basins are defined areas where wastewater flows to a specific wastewater treatment facility or collection point. The dataset is crucial for managing and maintaining the city's sewer infrastructure, planning for wastewater treatment capacity, and ensuring the efficient operation of the wastewater system.

name: Utilities Sewer System
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Sewer and Water Service Area
description: This dataset contains both the sewer and water service areas in Bellevue. These boundaries indicate the extent of the city's sewer and water infrastructure coverage, providing essential services like wastewater collection and treatment, as well as water supply and distribution. The dataset is crucial for planning, managing, and maintaining these systems, and for informing infrastructure development and expansion projects within the city.

name: Storm Drainage Basins
description: This dataset contains the spatial data for storm drainage basins in Bellevue. Storm drainage basins are catchment areas where stormwater runoff is collected and directed to stormwater management facilities or natural drainage systems. The dataset is essential for planning and implementing effective stormwater management practices, flood control measures, and maintaining the city's storm drainage infrastructure.

name: Sewer Access Points
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Sewer Clean Outs
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Sewer Internal Repair Point
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Sewer Lateral Lines
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Sewer Lateral Lines Abandoned
description: This dataset contains sewer infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes components such as inlets, fittings, discharge points, valves, clean outs, stations, manholes, pipes, casings, vaults, and repairs. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's wastewater collection and treatment system, as well as for infrastructure development and emergency response purposes.

name: Utilities Water System
description: This dataset contains water infrastructure locations within the Bellevue service area. The dataset includes individual components such as meters, fittings, valves, fire flow, hydrants, interties, pumps, inlet stations, reservoirs, sampling stations, pipes, casings, vaults, and structures. Data within high-security areas has been redacted to ensure safety and security. This comprehensive dataset is essential for managing, maintaining, and planning the city's water supply and distribution system,

name: Arterial Sweeping Routes
description: This dataset contains data about the City of Bellevue street arterials, their classification, and other data associated to sweeping routes. This data is updated as needed to support city operations.

name: Arterial Classification
description: This dataset contains data about the City of Bellevue street arterial classification. This data is updated as needed to support city operations.

name: Bicycle Facilities
description: This dataset contains information about bicycle facilities located through the City of Bellevue to include their approximate year of construction.

name: Bicycle Network
description: To delineate both the existing network of bicycle facilities, the proposed bicycle projects, and the facilities that are deemed complete but do not have any strictly defined bicycle facility. This network is used to both describe the existing projects and to also keep track of proposed projects and their status.

name: Pedestrian Facilities
description: This dataset contains information about pedestrian facilities located through the City of Bellevue to include their approximate year of construction.

name: Pedestrian Network
description: To delineate both the existing network of pedestrian facilities and the proposed pedestrian projects. This network is used to both describe the existing projects and to also keep track of proposed projects and their status. It also is a depiction of the entire priority network of sidewalks and trails that form a continuous system of paths through the City.

name: Public Right-of-Way (ROW)
description: This dataset contains data about the City of Bellevue public right-of-way. This data is updated as needed to support city operations.

name: Sidewalks
description: This dataset contains information about pedestrian sidewalks located through the City of Bellevue to include their approximate year of construction.

name: Snow Routes
description: This dataset contains data about the City of Bellevue street arterials and their snow routes. This data is updated as needed to support city operations.

name: Streets
description: This dataset contain city streets data including arterial classification and function.

name: Trails
description: This dataset includes trail data from around the City of Bellevue that includes function, surface types, trail names, park name, and its current status.

name: Transportation Analysis Zones (TAZ)
description: Transportation analysis zone data used by the City. This dataset is updated when required to support City operations.

name: Offenses
description: City of Bellevue Offenses curated data from 2017 to present. This dataset is updated daily at 5:30AM PST via automated means.

name: Bellevue Permits
description: Snapshot of Bellevue Development Services permitting data starting in 1998 to present day. This dataset is live. It is refreshed daily ~6AM Pacific Time. The spatial position of displayed permits is calculated from the permits system of record and may not match the location displayed in public mapping systems.For questions about this dataset, please contact Bellevue Open Data.

name: Buildings
description: This dataset represents the building footprints within the Bellevue area. The dataset includes the general shape and dimensions of each building, providing detailed information on the layout and distribution of structures throughout the city for urban planning, infrastructure development, and emergency response purposes.

name: Vision Zero Collisions
description: Locations of ped, bike, and auto fatalities and serious injuries in Bellevue. Locations of serious injuries have been moved near the closest intersections while fatalities are in their original incident location.

name: Open Data Portal Public User Guide
description: This guide provides instructions on navigating the Open Data Portal site, how to use Open Data, and an introduction to advanced capabilities.

name: Business List - By License Issue Date
description: Listing of registered businesses including license issue date.

name: Business Listing Map
description: List of Bellevue businesses including registration date.

name: Code Compliance Enforcement Activity
description: Bellevue code compliance enforcement activity (for the previous 5 years) where permit type is filtered on code EA.Note: The data shown in this map is updated daily. The unfiltered data source can be found here . If you would like to have the complete data set going back to 1998 please contact OpenData@bellevuewa.gov and request the complete Permit Data set.

name: Bellevue Permits Multi-family, Apartment, & Condo Projects
description: Permits for multi-family, apartment and condo projects.Data Sources:City of BellevueData Collection Method:System of Record - Updated daily by 6AM PST

name: Street Trees
description: Find out details about street trees in your neighborhood, or request pruning or other maintenance on a particular tree.

name: Human Services Needs
description: The City of Bellevue publishes the Human Services Needs Update at the beginning of each two-year funding cycle. Since 1989 this report has offered a summary of human services trends, needs and gaps in Bellevue, East King County, King County and Washington. The Needs Update helps the Human Services Commission develop focus areas for funding recommendations to the City Council, guides the city’s Human Services division and provides information for other city departments, faith communities, concern

name: Community Risk Assessment
description: The Fire Community Risk Assessment web app provides viewing of Fire incidents, along with other hazard data and fire protection systems.  Census data is also shown on this app.

name: Commercial & Non-Residential Permits
description:
Permits for commercial and nonresidential purposes.
Map Layers include below filtered data:

Nonresidential and Commercial Permits in Review

Permit Type: BB, BM
Subtype: Commercial, Nonresidential, Hotel, Office, Other, School
Permit Status: Open, Pending




Nonresidential and Commercial Permits Issued

Permit Type: BB, BM
Subtype: Commercial, Nonresidential, Hotel, Office, Other, School
Permit Status: Issued


 

Nonresidential and Commercial Permits Completed

Permit Type: BB, BM
Subtype: Co

name: Bellevue Population Dashboard
description: Dashboard application providing estimates of total population in Bellevue, Washington on April 1st each year since incorporation in 1953

name: Bellevue Permits Single Family Structure
description: Application contains data and layers filtered for permits assigned to single family structures.

name: Bellevue Permits Noise Exemption Variance
description: All noise exemption variance applications (current and historical).PERMIT TYPE is LY

name: Bellevue Permit Projects & Developments
description: This application contains information related to permits around development projects within the city.

name: Bellevue Permit Design Review
description: A filter is in place on Permit Type = LD and PermitStatus = Pending for this web map

name: Bellevue Permit Data UE Issued
description: Bellevue Permit Data Permit Issued is UE type.

name: Bellevue Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) Permits
description: Bellevue ADU permit data web application used for the Bellevue open data portal. Includes the ADU permit data and neighborhood area data.

name: Bellevue Live Traffic Map
description: Real-time traffic map showing level of congestion on major streets. Data is updated every 60 seconds. Map also provides access to real-time traffic cameras and video at selected locations.

name: MyBellevue 311 Dashboard
description: Dashboard of citizen requests submitted through the MyBellevue application.
